title: Allogene (ALLO) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Allogene Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript. Cash Position: $258.3M in cash/equivalents as of Dec 31, 2025. Additional $23.7M from Servier arbitration escrow Feb 2026. $20.7M raised YTD through ATM. Runway extended into 2028. 2025 Results: Full-year loss $190.9M ($0.87/share). R&D $150.2M ($12.9M non-cash). G&A $56.8M ($24.7M non-cash). 2026 Guidance: Operating cash: ~$150M. GAAP expenses: ~$210M (~$35M non-cash). ALPHA-3 Lymphoma: Interim futility results April 2026. MRD clearance evaluation in 24 patients (12 per arm). Target threshold: 25-30% absolute delta. 60+ US/Canadian sites. Expansion in Australia/Korea. ALLO-329 Autoimmune: PoC data June 2026. Starting dose: 20M CAR T cells. Testing with/without lymphodepletion. Update by year-end.
